text.title: Competitor Analysis Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals onto a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: halt; broaden category or run idea-generation first
STOP and pin geography before any snapshot
skip price columns; emit 'enterprise quote' annotation
run full 5-step framework with fan-out snapshots

example.trace: direct=6 -> geography=pinned -> pricing=visible -> run full framework, fan-out 12 snapshots.

text.example: Worked path from root-question to conclusion.
